notes: Son of Parmenio, a general and close companion of Alexander the Great; involved in military and political affairs during Alexander's reign.

docs.title: Life of Alexander
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: For besides that he was valiant and able to endure any fatigue of war, he was also next to Alexander himself the most munificent, and the greatest lover of his friends, one of whom asking him for some money, he commanded his steward to give it him; and when he told him he had
